title: Vortex pool
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''vortex pool''' was a chamber filled with [[Water/Legends|water]] that shot in currents, where beings could relax or play.

[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] had one in their garden during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]].

==Behind the scenes==
This appears to be similar to a [[hot tub]] or jacuzzi.

==Appearances==
*''[[Before the Storm]]''

|pt=Piscina Vortex
}}
